import duckdb
conn = duckdb.connect(''c:/Users/quang/CRC Code/ExcelIngestion/powerbi/dev_warehouse.duckdb'', read_only=True)
tables = [r[0] for r in conn.execute(''SHOW TABLES'').fetchall()]
print(''DuckDB Tables:'')

expected_marts = [''mart_tasks_enriched'', ''mart_team_capacity'', ''mart_team_demand'', ''mart_onshore_offshore'', ''mart_backlog'', ''mart_turnaround'', ''mart_daily_trend'']

for t in sorted(tables):
    count = conn.execute(f''SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ""{t}""'').fetchone()[0]
    cols = len(conn.execute(f''SELECT * FROM ""{t}"" LIMIT 0'').description)
    status = ''✅'' if t in expected_marts else ''''
    print(f''  {status} {t}: {count:,} rows, {cols} columns'')

print()
print(''Expected 7 marts check:'')
for m in expected_marts:
    exists = m in tables
    has_rows = conn.execute(f''SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ""{m}""'').fetchone()[0] > 0 if exists else False
    print(f''  {m}: {""✅ EXISTS"" if exists else ""❌ MISSING""} {""("" + str(conn.execute(f""SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {m}"").fetchone()[0]) + "" rows)"" if exists else """"}'')

conn.close()
